questions.question: Jude urges believers to contend for what?
options: The faith once delivered to the saints
questions.correct: The faith once delivered to the saints
questions.feedback: Contend for the faith that was once for all delivered to the saints.

questions.question: Jude mentions a dispute between the archangel Michael and the devil over what?
questions.feedback: Michael the archangel disputed with the devil about the body of Moses.

questions.question: Jude says certain ungodly people have secretly slipped in among believers.
questions.feedback: Certain ungodly people have secretly slipped in among you.

questions.question: To him who is able to keep you from _____ and to present you before his glorious presence without fault.
questions.feedback: To him who is able to keep you from stumbling and present you faultless.

questions.question: Build yourselves up in your most holy faith and pray in the Holy _____.
questions.feedback: Build yourselves up in your most holy faith, praying in the Holy Spirit.
